fields.name: AOC Q27G3XMN – 27” 180Hz Mini-LED Gaming Monitor
fields.description: One of the strongest gaming monitors in the £200–£300 range right now. The Mini-LED backlight delivers excellent contrast and HDR punch that most budget monitors simply can’t match, while the 180Hz refresh rate keeps everything buttery smooth.
fields.meta_title: AOC Q27G3XMN Review – Best Value 1440p Mini-LED Gaming Monitor 2026
fields.meta_description: Sharp 1440p, 180Hz, Mini-LED HDR1000 and excellent value – a standout gaming monitor on Amazon UK.
fields.pros:
Mini-LED with HDR1000 for deep blacks and bright highlights
Sharp 1440p resolution with great colours
180Hz + 1ms response time
Height-adjustable stand
fields.cons:
VA panel has slightly slower pixel response than pure IPS
HDR performance shines brightest in darker rooms

fields.name: AOC Q27G4XD – 27” 180Hz Fast IPS Gaming Monitor
fields.description: Looking for speed and colour accuracy without breaking the bank? This Fast IPS panel combines 180Hz refresh rate with excellent motion clarity and wide viewing angles – perfect for competitive and immersive gaming alike.
fields.meta_title: AOC Q27G4XD Review – Fast IPS 1440p Gaming Monitor
fields.meta_description: Responsive 180Hz Fast IPS with sharp QHD and great motion handling.
fields.pros:
Super responsive Fast IPS panel (0.5ms MPRT)
Sharp QHD resolution with vibrant colours
Adaptive Sync (G-Sync compatible)
Height-adjustable stand
fields.cons:
HDR400 is basic
Blacks are good but not as deep as VA panels

fields.name: AOC 27G2ZNE – 27” 240Hz Gaming Monitor
fields.description: Pure speed on a budget. This 27" 240Hz monitor is built for esports and competitive players who want maximum frame rates and the smoothest possible motion.
fields.meta_title: AOC 27G2ZNE Review – Best Budget 240Hz Gaming Monitor
fields.meta_description: Ultra-high 240Hz refresh rate at an affordable price – ideal for competitive gaming.
fields.pros:
Blazing 240Hz refresh rate
Excellent response time and Adaptive Sync
High contrast VA panel
fields.cons:
Only Full HD resolution
1080p can look softer on 27"
Stand is fairly basic

fields.name: Z-Edge 27" QHD 240Hz Gaming Monitor
fields.description: Insane specs for the money. This 27" 1440p monitor pushes 240Hz with a fast IPS panel, giving you both sharp visuals and ultra-high refresh rate.
fields.meta_description: High refresh rate 1440p gaming monitor with aggressive pricing and strong performance.
fields.pros:
2560x1440 resolution + 240Hz
Fast 1ms response time
Bright panel with HDR10 support
Very competitive pricing
fields.cons:
Brand is less established than AOC
Stand and build quality are average

fields.name: KOORUI 24E3 – 24” High Refresh Gaming Monitor
fields.description: Smaller size, bigger speed. The 24" form factor is loved by competitive gamers. This model delivers high refresh rate, solid colours, and great value in a compact package.
fields.meta_title: KOORUI 24E3 Review – Best Compact 24" Gaming Monitor
fields.meta_description: Affordable high-refresh 24-inch monitor perfect for esports and competitive play.
fields.pros:
Compact 24" size ideal for esports
High refresh rate (165Hz+) with fast response
Good colour performance for the price
Saves desk space
fields.cons:
Only Full HD resolution
Limited stand adjustability

fields.title: Best Gaming Monitors Under £300 in 2026 – 5 Strong Picks Compared
fields.excerpt: Five excellent gaming monitors between £140–£260 that deliver real performance without breaking the bank.
fields.content:
## Why these monitors are worth buying in 2026

You no longer need to spend £400+ to get a monitor that feels fast, sharp, and enjoyable. The five picks below all sit comfortably in the £140–£260 range and each brings something genuinely useful.

### 🔥 Best overall – AOC Q27G3XMN
**AOC Q27G3XMN** stands out as the best all-rounder thanks to its Mini-LED backlight.

[product_image:aoc-q27g3xmn]

It delivers deep blacks, bright HDR highlights, and smooth 180Hz gameplay in sharp 1440p.

[product_button:aoc-q27g3xmn]

### Best speed & colour accuracy – AOC Q27G4XD
If you prefer lightning-fast motion and vibrant colours, choose the **AOC Q27G4XD**.

[product_image:aoc-q27g4xd]

Its Fast IPS panel offers excellent response times and wide viewing angles.

[product_button:aoc-q27g4xd]

### Best pure competitive speed – AOC 27G2ZNE
Want maximum smoothness on a tight budget? The **AOC 27G2ZNE** gives you a blistering 240Hz.

[product_image:aoc-27g2zne]

[product_button:aoc-27g2zne]

### Best high-refresh 1440p value – Z-Edge 27" QHD 240Hz
The **Z-Edge 27" 240Hz** combines sharp 1440p with ultra-high refresh rate.

[product_image:z-edge-27-qhd-240hz]

[product_button:z-edge-27-qhd-240hz]

### Best compact esports pick – KOORUI 24E3
The **KOORUI 24E3** is perfect if you like the smaller 24" size for competitive play.

[product_image:koorui-24e3]

[product_button:koorui-24e3]

## Quick comparison

| Product | Size | Resolution | Refresh Rate | Best for | Approx. Price |
|---------|------|------------|--------------|----------|---------------|
| AOC Q27G3XMN | 27" | 1440p | 180Hz | Best overall + HDR | £260 |
| AOC Q27G4XD | 27" | 1440p | 180Hz | Speed & colours | £210 |
| Z-Edge 27" QHD 240Hz | 27" | 1440p | 240Hz | High-res + high refresh | £190 |
| AOC 27G2ZNE | 27" | 1080p | 240Hz | Pure competitive speed | £150 |
| KOORUI 24E3 | 24" | 1080p | 165Hz+ | Compact esports | £140 |

## Final verdict

- Best balance → **AOC Q27G3XMN**
- Raw speed & colours → **AOC Q27G4XD**
- Maximum Hz on budget → **AOC 27G2ZNE** or **KOORUI 24E3**
- Sharp 1440p + high refresh → **Z-Edge**

All five are currently available on Amazon UK and will give you a clear upgrade over basic monitors.
fields.verdict: Five excellent gaming monitors under £300 that deliver real speed, sharpness, and value in 2026.
fields.best_for: Gamers looking for strong performance without spending over £300
fields.meta_title: Best Gaming Monitors Under £300 in 2026 – 5 Top Picks Compared
fields.meta_description: Honest comparison of the best gaming monitors under £300 in 2026 with AOC, Z-Edge and KOORUI models.
